Army Writer Tool

AR 25-50 Compliant Correspondence Generator
Report Problem
Errors (must fix before generating)
Warnings
First time? Click here for help

What is this tool? It creates properly formatted Army memos (and other correspondence) as Word documents, following AR 25-50 rules so you don't have to memorize them.

How to use it:

  1. Pick your Document Type (usually "Memorandum")
  2. Fill in the fields marked with * (required)
  3. Click Generate DOCX to download your formatted memo
  4. Open it in Word, review, print, and sign

Not sure what to put? Click Load Example in the top bar to see a filled-out memo you can edit.

Tips: Subject and office symbol are auto-capitalized. Two spaces after periods are added automatically. The tool warns you if something doesn't look right before generating.

Document Type

Letterhead

Using default DoD seal
Your division, brigade, battalion, or company name
Specific office or section within the unit, if applicable
Base name, state, and ZIP code

Office Symbol & Date

Your unit's code (check a recent memo or ask your NCO/S1)
Auto-formatted to Army standard (e.g., 2 April 2026)

Addressee

Who is this memo going to? Just type the recipient — don't type "MEMORANDUM FOR", we add that automatically. One per line if multiple.
The intermediate commander(s) who will review this before it reaches the addressee
How you greet the recipient in a letter

Subject *

What is this memo about? Keep to 10 words or less. Don't type "SUBJECT:" — we add it automatically. Auto-capitalized.

Parties to Agreement

MOA: transfer of funds anticipated. MOU: no transfer of funds (para 2-6a, 2-6b)

Endorsement Details

Body

Single-spaced text, double-spaced between paragraphs. No number on single-paragraph memos. Use sub-paragraphs for subdivisions (a, b, c). (AR 25-50, para 2-4b)

Complimentary Close

Signature Block

This is who signs the memo. Your name, rank, and title/position.
Your full name as it appears on official documents (auto-capitalized for memos)
Your abbreviated rank and branch

Additional Signature Blocks

Enclosures (optional)

Documents attached to this memo (maps, orders, supporting docs). Leave blank if none.

Copies Furnished (optional)

Who else gets a copy of this memo besides the main recipient? Leave blank if nobody.

Distribution (optional)

Use only if memo goes to a large group (e.g., "All personnel assigned to 2nd BN"). Most memos don't need this.

Options

Preview

Fill out the form and click Refresh to see a live preview

Army Writer Tool is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the U.S. Department of Defense or any branch of the U.S. Armed Forces.

Formatting rules based on AR 25-50 (10 October 2020, with administrative revisions through 4 October 2024) and the HQDA J6 memo template.

This tool runs entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
